tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Nothings Gonna Change My Love For You

content:
Words and Music by Peter Cetera and David Foster
Transpose +7 to get to recorded key.

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] / [ch]F2[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] / [ch]F2[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
  You know our love was meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]
  The kind of love that lasts for-ever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
  And I want you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
  From to-night until the end of time[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]
You should know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab/C[/ch]         [ch]Db[/ch]
Everywhere I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Always on my mind, in my heart, in my soul, baby[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]
You're the meaning of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're the in-spi-ra-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]G/B[/ch]
  You bring feeling to my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're the in-spi-ra-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F/Bb[/ch]
  Wanna have you near me[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Ebm7/Bb[/ch]
I wanna have you hear me saying,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb5/Ab[/ch]  [ch]Bb5[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]
 "No one needs you more than  I  need you[/tab]

[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] / [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
And I know (And I know) / Yes I know that it's plain to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]
 So in love when we're to-gether[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                                  [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Now I know (Now I know) / That I need you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7/Bb[/ch]          [ch]Ab[/ch]
 From to-night until the end of time[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]
You should know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab/C[/ch]         [ch]Db[/ch]
Everywhere I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Always on my mind, in my heart, in my soul, baby[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]
You're the meaning of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're the in-spi-ra-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]G/B[/ch]
  You bring feeling to my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're the in-spi-ra-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F/Bb[/ch]
  Wanna have you near me[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Ebm7/Bb[/ch]
I wanna have you hear me saying,[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]Eb/F[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
  No one needs you more than I - need - you[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]
You're the meaning of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're the in-spi-ra-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]G/B[/ch]
  You bring feeling to my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're the in-spi-ra-tion[/tab]

[Coda]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
When you love somebody till the end of time[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
When you love somebody - Always on my -[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/B[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
No one needs you more than I[/tab]

(Repeat til fade)
